ARCLK Revenue $11.8 Billion Arcelik Global is a Turkish multinational household appliances manufacturer headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Founded in 1955 as a subsidiary of Koc Holding, the company has grown into a worldwide producer and marketer of consumer durables and consumer electronics. ktmb.com.my zoominfo.com/c/keretapi-tanah-melayu-berhad/21365008 KTMB (Keretapi Tanah Melayu Berhad) is Malaysia's largest and oldest railway company, with a rail network spanning 1,699 km across Peninsular Malaysia, extending into Singapore and Thailand. It operates multiple services including KTM Komuter (urban commuter trains since 1995), ETS electric intercity trains, and diesel-powered KTM Intercity trains. The company was privatized in 1992 and today offers online ticketing via its website and mobile app, with a QR-code boarding system

triquim.com.ar zoominfo.com/c/triquim-sa/430429498 TRIQUIM S.A. is an Argentine pharmaceutical manufacturer founded in 1980 and headquartered in Tortuguitas, Buenos Aires, that has dedicated over 40 years to the synthesis and supply of Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs) for human and veterinary use. The company operates as a CMO/CDMO partner, offering custom API development, contract manufacturing, regulatory services, containment, and analytical services to pharma clients worldwide. TRIQUIM holds certifications from Brazil's ANVISA and Mexico's COFEPRIS, and supplies clients across North America, Europe, and emerging markets with a portfolio of 16 pharmaceutical products including Benfotiamine, Bosentan, and Clonixinal

eapsc.net zoominfo.com/c/engineered-advantage/1292942990 Engineered Advantage, PSC (EA) is a multidisciplinary architecture and engineering (A/E) firm founded in 2011 and headquartered in San Juan, Puerto Rico, serving both public and private sector clients. modernflourmills.com zoominfo.com/c/the-modern-flour-mills-and-macaroni-factories-co/425333381 Modern Flour Mills & Macaroni Factories Co. (MFM) is a diversified cereal processor founded in 1949 and headquartered in Amman, Jordan, with a workforce of 201–500 employees. The company operates four main production plants — wheat flour milling, pasta, snack foods, and bakery ingredients — and notably opened the first pasta factory in the entire Middle East in 1967. Its products are sold under well-known regional brands: Al-Ghazal (flour & pasta), Suprema/Barakeh (pasta), MFM (specialty flour & baking mixes), and Samar (snacks), with co-packing and private labeling available for export markets

east-inc.jp zoominfo.com/c/east/5000054099 East Inc. is a Japanese company headquartered in Tokyo that provides comprehensive outsourcing services for commercial facilities — shopping malls, outlet parks, and office complexes — covering everything from day-to-day operations to system development, website management, and information services. The company has an impressive track record of over 800 commercial facilities nationwide across Japan, with clients including Roppongi Hills, Nihonbashi Takashimaya S.C., Mitsui Outlet Parks, and Ebisu Garden Place. Since 2007, East Inc. has also been supporting Japanese companies expanding into China, offering systems and operational know-how for overseas operations

millenniumptrs.com zoominfo.com/c/millennium-partners-inc/483051874 Millennium Partners is a premier luxury real estate developer founded in 1991 and headquartered in New York City, with over three decades of transforming urban neighborhoods through landmark mixed-use developments in gateway cities such as New York, Boston, San Francisco, and Washington D.C.. The company has pioneered the luxury branded residential experience by forging first-of-their-kind partnerships with Ritz-Carlton and Four Seasons, and today owns a portfolio worth over $5 billion encompassing 3,200+ condominiums, 10 hotels, 2 million sq ft of office space, and 1 million sq ft of retail. In 2023, Millennium Partners opened Winthrop Center in Boston — the world's largest Passive House office building — setting a new global benchmark for sustainability and human-centered design

opa.on.ca zoominfo.com/c/ontario-physiotherapy-association/130548231 The Ontario Physiotherapy Association (OPA) is a non-profit, physiotherapist-led professional association representing over 5,500 physiotherapists, physiotherapist assistants (PTAs), and students across Ontario, Canada. Its core mission is to provide leadership, advocacy, professional development, and career support to ensure accessible, high-quality physiotherapy services throughout the province. Founded over 60 years ago, OPA has a well-documented history of advocacy wins — from expanding PT scopes of practice to supporting virtual care access and removing referral requirements from physicians

levanteliving.com zoominfo.com/c/levante-living-lp/388951109 Levante Living is a Canadian-owned senior living enterprise founded in 2016 by Michael Petersen and Jim MacDonald, and headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, focused on acquiring, managing, and redeveloping senior housing across North America. The company currently operates 24 retirement residences across Ontario, employs over 600 team members, and manages approximately 1,600 investors with over $175 million in senior living assets. Its service offerings span the full care spectrum — independent living, assisted living, memory care, respite care, and long-term care — guided by the values of dignity, compassion, integrity, and excellence

kasapreko.com zoominfo.com/c/kasapreko-company-ltd/113558803 Kasapreko PLC is Ghana's leading herbal beverage manufacturer, founded in 1989 by Dr. Kwabena Adjei in a garage in Nungua, Accra, and today grown into a multinational company with over 500 employees, 100+ product SKUs, and exports to 16 countries worldwide. The company pioneered the first scientifically formulated herbal-based alcoholic beverage in Ghana — Alomo Bitters — which became its flagship product and was named by CNN Money as one of the top 5 emerging brands in the world in 2013. ISO 22000:2005 certified and a member of the prestigious Ghana Club 100, Kasapreko produces bitters, whisky, gin, liqueur, brandy, wine, soft drinks, and water, with active expansion into East Africa including Kenya

kk-marutake.co.jp zoominfo.com/c/marutake/561552308 Marutake Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive pharmaceutical and medical wholesale company founded on June 15, 1925, and headquartered in Niigata City, Japan, with a 100-year history of connecting manufacturers to healthcare providers across the region. The company distributes prescription pharmaceuticals, medical devices, clinical diagnostic reagents, hygiene materials, nursing care products, and healthcare IT systems to hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies, primarily across Niigata, Yamagata, Miyagi, Akita, Tokyo, and Gunma prefectures. With a workforce of 477 employees and capital of ¥100 million, Marutake positions itself as a "supporter of the medical frontline," ensuring stable supply of essential medical commodities to local communities

lakaffagroup.com zoominfo.com/c/la-kaffa-international-co-ltd/426003975 La Kaffa International is a publicly listed Taiwanese multinational food and beverage group (Taiwan Stock Exchange, code: 2732), founded in 2004 and headquartered in Zhubei City, Hsinchu County, Taiwan, with over 663 employees and annual revenues around $46 million.
